formatted_display: English: Friday, 20 March 2026 | Nepali: Friday, 06 Chaitra 2082
quote: Live in each season as it passes; breathe the air, drink the drink, taste the fruit, and resign yourself to the influence of the earth.
formatted_quote: "Live in each season as it passes; breathe the air, drink the drink, taste the fruit, and resign yourself to the influence of the earth." - Henry David Thoreau
